allow: PowerShell($url = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("DATABASE_URL"\); if \($url\) { "Env var is set in process" } else { $content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system\\.env.local"; $line = $content | Where-Object { $_ -match "^DATABASE_URL=" }; if \($line\) { $val = $line -replace "^DATABASE_URL=",""; "Starts with: " + $val.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(30, $val.Length\)\) + "..." } else { "DATABASE_URL line not found" } })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d `"c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system`" && npx next dev --port 3000 > `"%TEMP%\\sandav-next.log`" 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/requests" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "Requests: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "Requests Error: " + $_.Exception.Message }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/clients" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "Clients: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "Clients Error: " + $_.Exception.Message }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/billing" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "Billing: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "Billing Error: " + $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d `"c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system`" && npx next dev --port 3000 > `"%TEMP%\\sandav-next.log`" 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\sandav-next.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d `"c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system`" && npx next dev --port 3000 > `"%TEMP%\\sandav-next.log`" 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 14; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "Status: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "Error: " + $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($dbUrl = \(Get-Content "c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system\\.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match "DATABASE_URL" }\) -replace "DATABASE_URL=",""; $uri = [System.Uri]$dbUrl; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName $uri.Host -Port $uri.Port -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Property TcpTestSucceeded, RemoteAddress, RemotePort)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process -Name "cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Cleared")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $log = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\sandav-next.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($log -match "Ready in"\) { Write-Host "Server ready"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\sandav-next.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d `"c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system`" && npx next dev --port 3000 > `"%TEMP%\\sandav-next.log`" 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(25\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $log = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\sandav-next.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($log -match "Ready in"\) { Write-Host "Ready"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d `"c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system`" && npx next dev --port 3000 > `"%TEMP%\\sandav-next.log`" 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(20\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $log = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\sandav-next.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($log -match "Ready in"\) { Write-Host "Ready"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\Users\\Mbali\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\sandav_internet_system\\.env.local"; $line = $content | Where-Object { $_ -match "^DATABASE_URL=" }; $url = $line -replace "^DATABASE_URL=",""; $uri = [System.Uri]$url; Write-Host "User: $\($uri.UserInfo.Split\(':'\)[0]\)"; Write-Host "Host: $\($uri.Host\)"; Write-Host "Port: $\($uri.Port\)"; Write-Host "DB: $\($uri.AbsolutePath\)")
